scripts.dev: cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5123/api VITE_USE_MOCK=false VITE_USE_MOCK_QUEUES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_TOPICS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_SUBSCRIPTIONS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_MESSAGES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_DLQ=false vite
scripts.dev:partial: cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:5123/api VITE_USE_MOCK=false VITE_USE_MOCK_QUEUES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_TOPICS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_SUBSCRIPTIONS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_MESSAGES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_DLQ=true vite
scripts.build: cross-env VITE_API_BASE_URL=/api VITE_USE_MOCK=false VITE_USE_MOCK_QUEUES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_TOPICS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_SUBSCRIPTIONS=false VITE_USE_MOCK_MESSAGES=false VITE_USE_MOCK_DLQ=false tsc -b && vite build
